_owner: TechBrot Inc. — Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor team
_methodology: One anonymized row is logged when a setup or migration engagement makes a platform recommendation (QuickBooks Online vs Desktop vs Enterprise vs other), capturing what drove the decision and what was chosen. No client-identifying data is ever stored. Observed on real engagements only — never modeled. The published page reports the live N and never reports a statistic on a cell with N<20.

_schema.engagement_id: string — anonymous opaque id, no client linkage
_schema.prior_system: string — one of: qb-desktop, qb-enterprise, qbo, xero, wave, sage, spreadsheets, none, other
_schema.recommended_system: string — one of: qbo, qb-enterprise, qb-desktop, other
_schema.decision_drivers: array<string> — e.g. inventory, multi-user, remote-access, payroll, cost, integrations, job-costing, reporting, industry-fit
_schema.switched: boolean — did the client adopt the recommendation
